tests.description: evolveParams returns all four structural fields (noiseFrequency, radialScale, twistStrength, fieldSpread) as finite numbers
At elapsedMs=60000, at least one structural field differs from base by >0.05
Smoothness — consecutive millisecond samples have structural field deltas < 0.001
No hard reset — scanning 0 to 120000ms at 16ms steps, max frame-to-frame delta is bounded
Seed variance — different seeds produce noticeably different structural evolution at 60s
Range clamping — structural fields stay within valid bounds across 0-300s scan
Determinism — same seed + elapsed produces identical structural output
Existing evolved params (paletteHue, cadence, paletteSaturation) are unaffected by structural curves
